title: AI Personal Finance Assistant: AI budgeting and personal finance planner | Product Hunt
excerpt: Personal Finance Assistant is an AI-powered toolkit that helps you organize budgets, track expenses, plan savings, and answer everyday money questions. It runs entirely in your browser with no installation, subscriptions, or bank connections. Built with Claude AI, it's designed for students, professionals, freelancers, and anyone who wants a simpler way to manage personal finances.
content_html: Personal Finance Assistant is an AI-powered toolkit that helps you organize budgets, track expenses, plan savings, and answer everyday money questions. It runs entirely in your browser with no installation, subscriptions, or bank connections. Built with Claude AI, it's designed for students, professionals, freelancers, and anyone who wants a simpler way to manage personal finances.

sentences.en: Personal Finance Assistant is an AI-powered toolkit that helps you organize budgets, track expenses, plan savings, and answer everyday money questions.
sentences.zh: 个人理财助手是一个人工智能驱动的工具包，可以帮助您组织预算、跟踪支出、计划储蓄并回答日常财务问题。

sentences.en: It runs entirely in your browser with no installation, subscriptions, or bank connections.
sentences.zh: 它完全在您的浏览器中运行，无需安装、订阅或银行连接。

sentences.en: Built with Claude AI, it's designed for students, professionals, freelancers, and anyone who wants a simpler way to manage personal finances.
sentences.zh: 它由 Claude AI 构建，专为学生、专业人士、自由职业者以及任何想要以更简单的方式管理个人财务的人而设计。

content_html_zh: 个人理财助手是一个人工智能驱动的工具包，可以帮助您组织预算、跟踪支出、计划储蓄并回答日常财务问题。 它完全在您的浏览器中运行，无需安装、订阅或银行连接。 它由 Claude AI 构建，专为学生、专业人士、自由职业者以及任何想要以更简单的方式管理个人财务的人而设计。
